Our Story

Why San Diego Chooses Café Matinal

We are a trusted cafe proudly serving the San Diego community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 179 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.

★★★★★

"This is THE BEST COFFEE stop in PB or possibly all of San Diego. Every drink is craft made and every item is prepared as ordered, so don't come here on a rush. Badr is an amazing and pleasant barista, he prepares your drink with so much attention to detail and the flavor he serves in his lattes are delicious and unique"
